title: Gujarat HC warns motor accident tribunals to be wary of "ready to use" disability certificates in insurance cases
description: The Gujarat High Court recently held Motor Accident Claims Tribunals (MACT) cannot rely on disability certificates in accident compensation cases without carefully examining their authenticity.Justice Hasmukh D Suthar observed that there are doctors who are willing to give "ready to use" disability certificates even without medically examining the person who seeks to make use of the certificate to claim compensation. In this regard, the High Court referred to earlier Supreme Court decision in Ra
